opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: $52 hides pet hair & scratches — couch looks brand new in 5 minutes
opportunities.before_state: Faded, scratched sofa blanketed in pet hair and mystery stains that no vacuum can fix
opportunities.after_state: Crisp, fitted cover that makes the couch look like a furniture-store showroom piece
opportunities.why_now: Spring shedding season drives peak couch-cover searches every April, and Mamma Mia's 24-30% commission makes each sale highly profitable per Reel.

opportunities.specific_product: Best Choice Products 3-piece outdoor bistro set
opportunities.transformation_hook: $179 turns a bare concrete patio into a styled outdoor retreat overnight
opportunities.before_state: Empty, sad back patio with zero seating and cracked concrete left bare all winter
opportunities.after_state: Inviting bistro setup with matching chairs and table ready for morning coffee outside
opportunities.why_now: Late April is peak patio-shopping week as temperatures rise and people plan their first outdoor gatherings, making before/after patio Reels go viral.

opportunities.specific_product: 2-tier pull-out under-sink cabinet organizer with sliding drawers
opportunities.transformation_hook: $38 turns under-sink chaos into a Pinterest bathroom in under 10 min
opportunities.before_state: Tangle of cleaning sprays, half-empty bottles, and knotted hair tools crammed under the sink
opportunities.after_state: Tiered pull-out shelves with everything categorized, labeled, and instantly accessible
opportunities.why_now: Spring cleaning content peaks in April and bathroom organization Reels consistently lead all home categories in saves and shares.

opportunities.transformation_hook: $24 Syruvia set makes meal prep 3x faster — junk drawer finally done
opportunities.before_state: Overflowing junk drawer of dull, mismatched peelers and gadgets that never get used
opportunities.after_state: Sleek matching tool set that sits on the counter and actually gets pulled out every night
opportunities.why_now: Spring healthy-eating resets drive kitchen-tool search spikes, and Syruvia's 20% commission turns a $24 impulse buy into a strong margin play.

opportunities.specific_product: Eli & Elm adjustable-fill side sleeper pillow with U-cutout
opportunities.transformation_hook: $79 Eli & Elm pillow killed my neck pain after literally one night
opportunities.before_state: Waking up stiff every morning with a flat, lifeless pillow offering zero neck support
opportunities.after_state: Waking up genuinely rested with a U-cutout pillow that keeps the neck perfectly aligned all night
opportunities.why_now: Bedroom refresh Reels spike every spring as people swap out winter bedding, and neck-pain transformation stories drive unusually high comment engagement.
